body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Match2One."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.match2one.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-on Website!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.match2one.com/contact/", "children": [{"text": "contact Match2One"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By connecting Match2One to your website, the platform will automatically track and learn about your online audience - where to find new customers online, and target people who are most likely to become a new customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Generally 2-3% of shoppers convert on the first visit to an online store. Retargeting brings back the other 97%. Retargeting works by tracking people who visit your site and showing your ads to them as they visit other sites online."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Easy to use, self-serve platform."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create stunning ads in Match2One\u2019s banner maker tool."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Prospecting & Retargeting."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Transparent & detailed reports."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Auto-pilot delivering high ROI."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Simplify modern advertising, premium inventory access."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Match2One"}], "data-id": "set-up-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Match2One have provided instructions to install tracking in Neto by Maropost on their "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://help.match2one.com/installation/how-to-install-tracking-in-neto-ecommerce", "children": [{"text": "help site"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
